untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) entry conditions not specified in source (AUTHOR_SILENT); (2) historical mean (µ) calculation from Ornstein-Uhlenbeck model not available in allowed indicators; (3) half-life threshold value not specified (AUTHOR_SILENT); (4) no indicator available to directly compute or represent mean-reversion half-life. Used sma_20 as pragmatic proxy for 'historical mean' but this is NOT equivalent to the true mean-reverting target price described in the signal. Exit logic should be OR (whichever occurs first) but cannot be properly modeled without half-life threshold parameter.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally untranslatable because it relies on statistical mean-reversion parameters (historical mean µ, half-life τ from Ornstein-Uhlenbeck process) that are not available in the allowed indicator set. The source material references these concepts but does not provide concrete parameter values. A proper implementation would require: (1) explicit entry conditions; (2) a lookback_period to calculate historical mean; (3) a computed half-life value; (4) regime detection to confirm mean-reversion is active. Substituting sma_20 for the mean is a crude approximation only. The CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction reflects that the signal applies to both long and short positions depending on entry.
